description.en: The name that theWorkerwas (optionally) given when it was created using theWorker()constructor. This is mainly useful for debugging purposes.

description.en: The name that theSharedWorkerwas (optionally) given when it was created using theSharedWorker()constructor. This is mainly useful for debugging purposes.

description.en: Returns theWorkerNavigatorassociated with the worker. It is a specific navigator object, mostly a subset of theNavigatorfor browsing scopes, but adapted to workers.

excerpt.es: Returns theWorkerNavigatorassociated with the worker. It is a specific navigator object, mostly a subset of theNavigatorfor browsing scopes, but adapted to workers.
excerpt.en: Returns theWorkerNavigatorassociated with the worker. It is a specific navigator object, mostly a subset of theNavigatorfor browsing scopes, but adapted to workers.
